questions.question: Explain the syntax and semantics of first-order logic.
expectedPoints: Define the syntax and semantics of first-order logic
Explain the concept of predicates and logical operators

questions.question: Use first-order logic to represent the following knowledge domain: 'A person is a student if they are enrolled in a course.'
expectedPoints: Represent the knowledge domain using first-order logic
Explain the meaning of the represented knowledge
Use the represented knowledge to derive conclusions
